/*
DELETE t
FROM dbo.TrialSetSelections t
JOIN dbo.TrialSet ts ON ts.id = t.TrialSetId
LEFT JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ts.hollowchildprofileid = cp.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget c ON ts.childProfileLessonTargetId = c.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON ts.MemberID = m.ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    cp.accountInfoId = a.ID OR 
    m.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
*/



DELETE t
FROM dbo.TrialSetSelections t
JOIN dbo.TrialSet ts ON ts.id = t.TrialSetId

-- Join through ChildProfile (preferred path for TrialSets)
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ts.hollowchildprofileid = cp.id
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID

-- Only delete if account is in the list and meets criteria
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

***/
